title: Carousel Directive
description: Integrates Swiper.js into ACoreX applications to create highly customizable and responsive carousels/sliders. The directive handles the initialization and configuration of the Swiper instance, automatically applying necessary CSS classes to your HTML structure.

hints.title: CSS Import Required
hints.content: Imports the Swiper CSS into your styles: @use 'swiper/swiper-bundle.css' as *;

hints.title: HTML Structure
hints.content: Ensure your HTML structure matches the expected structure. The directive adds classes but does not create elements.

hints.title: Bundle Size
hints.content: The directive imports all Swiper modules. Be mindful of bundle size if you only use a subset of modules.

sections.title: Usage
sections.description: A simple example of using the axCarousel directive

props.name: carousel
props.description: Signal holding the Swiper instance. Returns null when not initialized.

props.name: carouselOptions
props.description: Input for Swiper configuration options. Accepts any valid Swiper.js options.
